lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in fair condition. It shows visible cosmetic wear on the exterior and interior. All mechanical systems are functional, though some components may require maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in fair condition. There are visible signs of wear on the interior and exterior, including several cosmetic blemishes. The mechanical and electrical systems are currently functional, but some components may require maintenance or repair in the near future.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver for someone who values mechanical reliability over cosmetic perfection. The exterior shows its age with noticeable paint oxidation on the hood and roof, along with a few minor door dings and light scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is functional but shows wear, particularly on the driver's seat bolster and some fading on the dashboard plastics. Mechanically, the car is sound and starts reliably, though the next owner should plan for a brake service and new tires within the next few months. There are some minor fluid seeps typical for a car of this mileage, but nothing requiring immediate repair. It is a solid, honest vehicle that is ready for the road, provided you don't mind the aesthetic imperfections.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a brand-new car. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep, mirror-like shine and absolutely no chips, scratches, or swirl marks. The interior is equally perfect, with pristine upholstery and a cabin that still retains a fresh-from-the-factory feel. Mechanically, the car is in top-tier shape, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled

Get ready to drive home a vehicle that is in truly flawless, showroom condition! This car has been meticulously maintained and looks absolutely stunning, inside and out. It’s a rare find that feels just like new, offering a perfect blend of performance and pristine care. Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to own a top-tier vehicle!

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and enduring value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior condition, it offers a refined driving experience supported by consistent mechanical integrity. Every facet of this automobile has been evaluated to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been super dependable for all my daily trips. It’s got a few signs of love here and there, but it still looks fantastic and drives like a dream! This would be a perfect fit for anyone looking for a reliable, well-cared-for car without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E92 M3 is a purist’s specification, powered by the high-revving S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 featuring individual throttle bodies and a 8,400 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal torque distribution. Mechanically robust, this example has undergone proactive rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service to ensure long-term reliability. The chassis retains its factory-tuned kinematics with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) offering three distinct damping modes. While displaying minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, the car maintains excellent compression across all cylinders and a rigid subframe, making it a mechanically superior candidate for the discerning driver.
Used vehicle in good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Title in hand. Ready for immediate sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather seating and a fully functional suite of modern tech amenities. Mechanically, this car is sound; it has been serviced regularly at scheduled intervals, with a recent oil change and a full multi-point inspection just completed. It shifts smoothly, brakes firmly, and provides a quiet, comfortable ride. Complete with a detailed service history and two sets of keys, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with total peace of mind.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Characterized by robust mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it delivers a driving experience that balances performance with enduring value. Our rigorous inspection process ensures this automobile meets our exacting standards for reliability and presentation. This is an exceptional acquisition for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber motorcar.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility, having been maintained with a high level of care. The exterior finish retains a deep, impressive luster, though a discerning eye might find minor stone chips on the hood typical of highway driving. Step inside to a cabin that remains a sanctuary; the premium leather upholstery is plush and intact, showing only slight softening on the driver’s side bolster. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system, operates exactly as intended. Under the hood, the engine is responsive and quiet, benefiting from a documented service history that includes a recent oil service, new brake rotors, and a fresh set of all-season tires. The suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride, free of any unsettling noises. This is a turn-key vehicle, ready for its next owner to enjoy a refined driving experience without the need for immediate maintenance.

We are pleased to offer this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies a high standard of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Meticulously maintained by its previous owner, the automobile has undergone a comprehensive professional inspection to ensure peak operational performance. The interior and exterior remain in commendable condition, reflecting a history of attentive care. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a reliable, high-caliber vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional long-term value.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. This automobile has been preserved to a high standard, showcasing consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic. Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for my reliable ride. It’s been such a fantastic car for me and is still in really solid shape—super clean and runs like a charm! It’s been well-loved and is totally ready for its next adventure. I’m sad to see it go, but I know you’re going to have a blast behind the wheel. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. The drivetrain consists of a 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox paired with an M Variable Differential Lock for optimal torque distribution. This example includes documented subframe reinforcement and a recent valve adjustment, ensuring the structural and mechanical integrity of the high-revving S54. Suspension kinematics remain sharp with refreshed bushings. While the aesthetic reflects honest use, the mechanical vitals—including oil analysis and cooling system pressure—are within spec, providing a pure, analog driving experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish, showing only minor, age-appropriate character marks, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and well-preserved. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the upholstery remains firm and free of tears, and the dual-zone climate control functions perfectly. Every electronic feature, from the premium audio system to the power-adjustable seating, has been tested and works as intended. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, backed by a comprehensive service history detailing regular synthetic oil changes and a recent inspection of the braking system. Garage-kept and originating from a smoke-free home, this car represents a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, honest vehicle that has been treated with care.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a refined interior, it offers a harmonious balance of performance and long-term reliability.
